rules.description: Connection Monitor is part of Azure Monitor logs. The extension also lets you monitor network connectivity for your private and Microsoft peering connections. When you configure Connection Monitor for ExpressRoute, you can detect network issues to identify and eliminate.
rules.fix: Connection Monitor is part of Azure Monitor logs. The extension also lets you monitor network connectivity for your private and Microsoft peering connections. When you configure Connection Monitor for ExpressRoute, you can detect network issues to identify and eliminate.
